highlights: The AI landscape is rapidly advancing agentic capabilities, with new memory architectures and frameworks enabling more autonomous and persistent AI systems for enterprise workflows.

OpenAI has released GPT-5.6, signaling a new frontier in model intelligence and efficiency, already being integrated into major platforms like Microsoft 365 Copilot, while open-source MoE models continue to evolve with strong performance and cost considerations.

Developers are gaining powerful new tools for building and fine-tuning AI, from NVIDIA's agentic Vision AI SDK and enhanced Gemini API for production agents to comprehensive open-source platforms for LLM, RAG, and agent development.

agents.title: Google Cloud’s Always-On Memory Agent Replaces RAG with Continuous LLM Consolidation
agents.summary: Google Cloud introduces a novel Always-On Memory Agent, built on Google ADK and Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite, that treats memory as a running process, eliminating the need for vector databases and embeddings for continuous LLM consolidation.

agents.title: Perplexity AI Releases WANDR: Open Benchmark for Research Agents
agents.summary: Perplexity AI launched WANDR, an open benchmark and evaluation harness with 500 evidence-heavy tasks, designed to test research agents' ability to discover and cite multiple qualifying entities with verifiable evidence, with Perplexity Search as Code leading the initial scores.

agents.title: ChatGPT Is Now a Partner for Ambitious Workflows
agents.summary: OpenAI positions ChatGPT Work as an advanced agent capable of taking action across user applications and files, sustaining projects for extended periods, and transforming complex goals into completed tasks, marking a significant leap in autonomous AI capabilities.

models.title: GPT-5.6: Frontier Intelligence That Scales with Your Ambition
models.summary: OpenAI announces GPT-5.6, offering more intelligence from every token, stronger performance per dollar, and enhanced capabilities on demand for the most demanding workloads, setting a new benchmark for frontier AI models.

models.title: GPT-5.6 Becomes Preferred Model in Microsoft 365 Copilot
models.summary: GPT-5.6 has been integrated as the preferred model for Microsoft 365 Copilot, delivering stronger AI capabilities across Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Chat, and Cowork to enable faster, higher-quality work for enterprise users.

models.title: Kimi K3 vs DeepSeek V4 Pro vs GLM-5.2: Open Trillion-Scale MoE Models Compared
models.summary: This comparison evaluates three open Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) flagship models—Kimi K3, DeepSeek V4 Pro, and GLM-5.2—across benchmarks, license terms, and real serving costs, providing critical insights for developers selecting large-scale open models.

tools.title: NVIDIA Released DeepStream 9.1 with Agentic AI for Vision AI
tools.summary: NVIDIA DeepStream 9.1 introduces 13 agentic skills, enabling coding agents to build multi-camera video analytics pipelines from natural language, alongside Multi-View 3D Tracking and automatic camera calibration, significantly enhancing intelligent vision system development.

tools.title: Expanding Managed Agents in Gemini API for Production-Ready Agents
tools.summary: Google announces new capabilities for Managed Agents in the Gemini API, empowering developers to build reliable, production-ready agents with features like background tasks and remote Multi-Channel Processors, streamlining advanced agent development.

tools.title: 10 Open-Source No-Code AI Platforms for Building LLM Apps, RAG, and Agents
tools.summary: This roundup presents 10 open-source no-code and low-code platforms, each with verified licenses and repositories, for rapidly building LLM applications, RAG systems, and AI agents, offering diverse options for accelerated AI development.

companies.title: How Cars24 Scales Conversations and Builds Faster with OpenAI
companies.summary: Cars24 leverages OpenAI-powered voice and chat agents to manage over 1 million monthly conversation minutes, recover 12% of lost leads, and integrate agentic workflows across teams, showcasing significant operational scaling and efficiency gains.

companies.title: How Deutsche Telekom Is Rewiring Telecommunications with AI
companies.summary: Deutsche Telekom is transforming into an AI-native telco by adopting OpenAI solutions to enhance customer service, optimize employee workflows, streamline network operations, and innovate the future of voice communications.

companies.title: OpenAI Introduces a Scorecard for the AI Age
companies.summary: Sarah Friar, OpenAI's CFO, introduces a practical AI scorecard designed to measure ROI through key metrics such as useful work produced, cost per successful task, dependability, and return on compute, providing a framework for strategic AI investment.

learning.title: Fine-Tuning Qwen3 with LoRA Using NVIDIA NeMo AutoModel: Google Colab Tutorial
learning.summary: A comprehensive Google Colab workflow tutorial guides users through fine-tuning Qwen3 with LoRA using NVIDIA NeMo AutoModel on a single GPU, covering setup, precision adaptation, and result comparison for practical model customization.

learning.title: Build an Agentic Event Venue Operator with MongoDB Atlas, Voyage, and LangGraph
learning.summary: This tutorial teaches how to build an advanced agent with persistent memory, operational context, and write-back capabilities, moving beyond basic agent demos by integrating MongoDB Atlas, Voyage, and LangGraph for complex use cases.

learning.title: How Sales Teams Use ChatGPT Work for Enhanced Productivity
learning.summary: This guide demonstrates how sales teams can leverage ChatGPT Work to streamline tasks such as creating pipeline briefs, preparing for meetings, conducting forecast reviews, developing account plans, and diagnosing stalled deals from real work inputs.
